title: Trunks (Jake #2) — Druid ☠
bodyText:
**DECEASED — Session 13.** Druid found disguised as a crab inside the gelatinous cube (S10). Kept himself sane with self-crafted vials; connected to Cumb and Mr. Spells. Walked into the dark alone (S12), was found transformed into a half-dwarf half-shadow monstrosity beside a horned demon — and in the battle's darkest moment **drank every vial at once**, dying in an anti-magic explosion that nearly killed the party. Buried by the party at the grove's edge (S14). Eddy carries his cursed sword ([[velmir]]).

His **journal** survived: a scientist living on the caves' border — experiments of all varieties, a section on meeting **Mr. Spells** (who helped him create the vials), and notes on his final experiments with the strange pool/cube entity.

> [!dm] Jake's next character per the S24 roster is... nobody new yet (party of 3 + Cumb). **Silus** remains the planned main (see [[ideas-parking-lot]]).
